title: I need clarity.
content:
I need clarity.

I know the IMC is dealing with accommodations for disability.

In the meantime, I've had an emergency that physically stopped me from travel. I will remain in the position I am currently in.

I do not have control of when the doctor's send the notes. This increases my anxiety by involving me at this level. I have no control over these elements.

My healthcare provider reached out to the IMC. My healthcare provider is advocating for me as I've had an ongoing health crisis.

I will continue to work.

In the meantime, have the IMC reach out to Dr Robinson to request the records.

I am authorizing the IMC to request the records directly.
